Work With Us
Read on to learn about paid and volunteer opportunities at the Gladstone
Paid Opportunities

 

Theatre Marketing Coordinator

The Gladstone Theatre wishes to hire a marketing individual, with the primary assignment to market a stage play that will be selected to run during the week of Sept 6th to 12th.

The play will be performed by a local, emerging and equity-deserving theatrical company.

Selection of the play is not yet complete. As such, there is a possibility that the play will be Francophone; in that case, fluency and skills in French will be required.  Additionally, knowledge and familiarity of the Chinese theatre audience’s market may be valuable.

The goal is to successfully market the play, to maximize house sizes, and ticket sales.

The early September timeframe is notorious for low theatre attendance.

The role and responsibilities for the marketing individual include, but are not limited to:

Create the marketing strategy for the play
Be consistent with the “look and feel” of current Gladstone marketing material
Execute the marketing strategy, using the Gladstone’s tools and resources, and/or alternative tools and resources of your recommendation
Educate Gladstone staff and advisors on the marketing strategy that is developed
a new and novel “look and feel” may be acceptable for the marketing campaign.
